# Development History

This folder contains development session logs and migration history for reference.

## Files

- [MIGRATION_HISTORY.md](MIGRATION_HISTORY.md) - Complete migration history from Jupyter notebooks to API-based rendering
- [FRONTEND_MODERNIZATION.md](FRONTEND_MODERNIZATION.md) - Frontend architecture improvements and feature modules

## Summary Timeline

### 2026-01-17
- Completed backend migration from Jupyter to API-based rendering
- Implemented client-side D3.js graph visualization
- Created feature module architecture (graph, repository, upload, settings)
- Added comprehensive graph styling controls
- Implemented interactive graph system with radial menu
- Layout algorithm integration with backend re-fetch

### Previous
- v0.3.0 - UV migration, local repo support, CLI improvements
- v0.2.0 - Initial FastAPI backend, GitHub parsing, Gravis visualization
